notes: Two new KeyKey features plus a settings fix. · New: 反查／拆碼提示 (Cangjie code hint) — turn on 反查提示 to show each character's 倉頡 code beside the candidate (e.g. 倉 → 人口竹口); handy in 速成 and 聯想. Off by default. · New: 臨時英數 (quick English) — hold Shift and press a letter to type that English letter directly, like the original Yahoo! KeyKey; case follows Caps Lock, and everything else stays Chinese. · Fixed: the 倉頡版本 (五代／三代) choice in Settings now saves correctly instead of reverting.
ci: pin release workflow to dragon-release-ci floating major @v5 · release: Yahoo KeyKey 2 v2.3.0 — adopt DragonKit (settings/About/Updates + Sync & Backup)

Two follow-ups from issue #30, for the 三代倉頡（Yahoo KeyKey 相容）mode: · New: z-code punctuation. In 三代倉頡 mode you can type punctuation with the classic Yahoo z-codes — zxcd → 「, zxce → 」, zxab → ，, zxbe → （. These were part of the original Yahoo table and are available again. · New: 「聯想只顯示接續字」option (設定… ▸ 一般). When enabled, the 聯想 (associated-phrase) window shows only the continuation after the character you just typed — e.g. after 關 it shows 係／心／於 instead of the full words 關係／關心／關於, like the classic Yahoo! KeyKey. Off by default; what you commit is unchanged either way.

New: choose your 倉頡版本 (Cangjie generation). In 設定… ▸ 輸入方式 you can now switch between 五代倉頡 (the standard 5th-generation table, the default) and 三代倉頡（Yahoo KeyKey 相容）. The 三代 option uses the original Yahoo! KeyKey code table and its candidate order, so characters like 面 (一田卜中), 鬼 (竹戈) and 樓 (木中田女) take the codes long-time Yahoo users remember instead of the 5th-generation forms. The choice applies to both 倉頡 and 速成 and takes effect immediately. The default stays 五代 so existing users are unaffected until they opt in.
fix: sync Settings window with quick menu (v2.0.2)
fix: IME bundle id must contain 'inputmethod' (v2.0.1)
About: dragonapp.com website + GitHub issues links (v1.7.2)
